title: Open Sans or Roboto?
subtitle:
Think you are better than the average designer?
See if you can guess them fonts correctly.

difficulty.custom: Or create your own font-guessing game

meta.medium: 10 questions - Open Sans, Roboto, Arial, Montserrat
meta.hard: 5 questions - Guess from 6 fonts at random
meta.diabolical: 5 questions - Guess from 8 fonts at random, with surprises
meta.custom: Pick which fonts and how many to guess from

custom.title: Create your own game
custom.subtitle: Pick which fonts and how many to guess from, then play {count} questions. Just for practice — no leaderboard.
custom.how_many: How many fonts to guess between?
custom.duplicate_error: Each slot needs a different font.

result.score_20: Were you even looking at the letters?
result.score_40: Close, but the fonts are not impressed.
result.score_60: Not bad. Not good either. The serifs are judging you.
result.score_80: Almost. You can almost smell the difference.
result.sorry: Your eye needs more training. The fonts can tell.
result.enter_name: Claim your spot on the Wall of Fame
result.email_hint: We'll whisper if someone de-capitalizes you
result.perfect_not_on_board: Flawless — but the Wall of Fame is already packed with faster perfectionists. Your score was saved, just off the podium for now.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.empty: No perfect scores yet. Be the first!
